# What makes Teri the perfect plus-one?

**From:** Coach <coach@mk.emna.coach.com>
**Date:** Thu, 09 Apr 2026 12:19:46 +0000

} .valign\_middle { vertical-align:middle !important; } .valign\_bottom { vertical-align:bottom !important; } } /\* Force hotmail/outlook.com to display at full width (outer div) \*/ .ReadMsgBody { width: 100%; } /\* Force hotmail/outlook.com to display at full width (inner div) \*/ .ExternalClass { width: 100%; } /\* Force Outlook to display view in browser link \*/ #outlook a { padding: 0; } /\* Remove default Android margin \*/ div\[style\*="margin: 16px 0"\] { margin: 0 !important; font-size: 100% !important; } \* { -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -moz-text-size-adjust: 100%; text-size-adjust: 100%; } body { background-color: #FFFFFF; padding: 0; margin: 0 !important; height: 100% !important; width: 100% !important; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } table { border-spacing: 0 !important; margin: 0 auto; border-collapse: collapse !important; } td { border-collapse: collapse !important; border-spacing: 0 !important; } table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; } th { font-weight: normal; } div, p, a, li, td { -webkit-text-size-adjust: none; } img { display: inline-block; outline: none; border: 0; -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; } a img { border: none; } /\* Prevent Apple link styling \*/ .mobile-link--footer a, a\[x-apple-data-detectors\] { color: inherit !important; } .appleLinks a { color: #010000; text-decoration: none; } .outer { width: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; } .container { width: 540px; background-color: #FFFFFF; } .mobileshow, .mobileshow table { display: none; width: 0px; max-height: 0px; overflow: hidden; mso-hide: all; } .column { vertical-align: top; direction: ltr; } .inner { display: block; } .h1 { color: #010000; font-size: 44px; font-family:'Helvetica Neue 73 Bold', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 115%; } .h2 { color: #010000; font-size: 32px; font-family:'Helvetica Neue 73 Bold', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 115%; } .bodytext { color: #010000; font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Bembo Regular', Georgia, serif; line-height: 1.2; } .bodytext a { color: #010000; } .button, .logo { margin: 0; } /\* Button A \*/ .button-a { color: #010000; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue 73 Bold', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; text-align: center; } .button-a a, a.button-a { color: #010000; text-decoration: none; display: block; } .button-a:hover, .button-a:hover span, .button-a:hover a { background-color: #010000 !important; color: #FFFFFF !important; } .disclaimer { font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 18px; color: #010000; } .disclaimer a { color: #010000 !important; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; line-height: 115%; } /\* Module Specific Styles \*/ .social\_icon { text-align: center; width: 20% !important; } .nav\_item { text-align: center; width: 33.33% !important; } /\* Mobile Navigation Styles \*/ \[class="x\_static\_nav"\], \[class="x\_fallback"\] { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } \[class="x\_interactive"\] { display: none !important; max-height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; } .static\_nav, .fallback { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } .interactive { display: none !important; max-height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; } @media screen and (max-width: 540px) { .android-hide { display: none !important; } .wrapper { width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; margin: auto !important; } .colsplit { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; float: left !important; } .container { width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; margin: auto !important; } .fluidimage { max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; margin-left: auto !important; margin-right: auto !important; } .hide { display: none !important; overflow: hidden !important; width: 0 !important; height: 0 !important; visibility: hidden !important; } img.hide { display: none !important; width: 0 !important; height: 0 !important; visibility: hidden !important; } .mobileshow { display: block !important; margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: visible !important; width: auto !important; max-height: inherit !important; } .mobileshow table { display: table !important; margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: visible !important; width: 100% !important; max-height: inherit !important; } .mobileshow img { display: block !important; margin: 0; padding: 0; overflow: visible !important; max-width: 100% !important; height: auto !important; margin-left: auto !important; margin-right: auto !important; } th.drop { width: 100% !important; display: block !important; } .column { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; direction: ltr !important; } .inner { display: block !important; padding: 30px 20px 0 20px !important; } .bodytext { font-size: 20px !important; line-height: 26px !important; } .button, .logo { margin: 0 auto !important; } .disclaimer { padding: 20px !important; } .disclaimer span { font-size: 12px !important; } ul, li { padding: 10px 20px 0 20px; } /\* Mobile Navigation Styles \*/ u+.gmail .static\_nav, u+.gmail .fallback { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; visibility: visible !important; } u+.gmail .interactive\_nav, u+.gmail .interactive { display: none !important; max-height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; } body\[data-outlook-cycle\] .static\_nav, body\[data-outlook-cycle\] .fallback { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } body\[data-outlook-cycle\] .interactive\_nav, body\[data-outlook-cycle\] .interactive { display: none !important; max-height: 0px !important; overflow: hidden !important; } #MessageViewBody .static\_nav, body.MsgBody .static\_nav, #MessageViewBody .fallback, body.MsgBody .fallback { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } #MessageViewBody .interactive\_nav, body.MsgBody .interactive\_nav, #MessageViewBody .interactive, body.MsgBody .interactive { display: none !important; max-height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; } .static\_nav { display: none; max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; } .interactive\_nav { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; } #checkbox\_nav { width: 25px; height: 25px; display: block !important; background-image: url(https://image.mail.coach.com/lib/fe3d15707564077d7d1171/m/1/07a210f6-a8f2-4c03-8ea3-6079c9658138.png); background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 25px 25px; cursor: pointer; } #interactive\_nav:checked+.controls\_nav #checkbox\_nav { background-image: url(https://image.mail.coach.com/lib/fe3d15707564077d7d1171/m/1/4dd78fba-4d49-4bd8-a22a-b7a7d0e178b5.png); } .menu\_nav { margin-left: -540px; -ms-transition: margin-left .5s ease-in-out; -webkit-transition: margin-left .5s ease-in-out; width: 100%; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute; } #interactive\_nav:checked~.menu\_nav { margin-left: 0; } .menu\_nav table { background-color: #FFFFFF !important; } u+.gmail .static\_nav, u+.gmail .fallback { display: block !important; max-height: none !important; visibility: visible !important; } u+.gmail .interactive\_nav, u+.gmail .interactive { display: none !important; max-height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; } /\* Module Specific Styles \*/ .nav\_item { font-size: 16px !important; } .keyline { padding: 0 20px !important; } } @media screen and (max-width: 350px) { /\* Mobile Navigation \*/ .nav\_logo { width: 220px !important; } #checkbox\_nav { width: 22px; height: 22px; background-size: 22px 22px; } .h1 { font-size: 36px !important; } .h2 { font-size: 28px !important; } .description { font-size: 14px !important; } .price, .button { font-size: 12px !important; } } :root {color-scheme: light dark;} @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body, table, td, div, h1, p, span {background-color:#000000 !important;color:#ffffff !important;} a {color:#ffffff !important;} a span {color:#ffffff !important;} td\[style\*="border-top"\], td\[style\*="border-bottom"\] {border-color:#ffffff !important;} img.dm-invert {filter:invert(1) !important;} } /\* Gmail dark mode \*/ u+.gmail img.dm-invert {mix-blend-mode:difference !important;} \[data-ogsc\] body, \[data-ogsc\] table, \[data-ogsc\] td, \[data-ogsc\] div, \[data-ogsc\] h1, \[data-ogsc\] p, \[data-ogsc\] span {background-color:#000000 !important;color:#ffffff !important;} \[data-ogsc\] a {color:#ffffff !important;} \[data-ogsc\] a span {color:#ffffff !important;} \[data-ogsc\] td\[style\*="border-top"\], \[data-ogsc\] td\[style\*="border-bottom"\] {border-color:#ffffff !important;} \[data-ogsc\] img.dm-invert {filter:invert(1) !important;}

Hint: it’s extra versatile.
